Options.OPTION[RealisticParking.Realisti: Lots of vehicles per parking spot
Demand Queue Size per Parking Spot
A couple vehicles per parking spot
Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[RealisticPark: Enable induced demand system for parking spots. This system counts every time a car or bike pathfinds to a parking lane, and once enough have routed to it, it will disable that spot for future pathfinding. If the spot remains vacant for some time, it will reopen for more requests.

Enable parking minimums for garages. If enabled, custom garage capacities will replace vanilla values. Vanilla apartments have up to 3 spots and offices have around 30. Properties with no garage in the asset are not affected.

Enable reroute distance change for car and bike navigation. In the vanilla system, a car or bike can sense that the parking spot they are navigating to is unavailable up to 40000 nodes away. This causes random u-turns on main roads, as they will suddenly change parking destinations while driving. This system aims to get rid of that by only letting the car or bike sense that the parking is unavailable from a closer distance.
The number of garage spots per household in residential properties. Properties with no garage in the asset are not affected.
The number of garage spots per worker in commericial/office properties. Non-RICO buildings are not affected. Properties with no garage in the asset are not affected.

The number of cars or bikes can pathfind to a parking lane before it starts considering the queue size per spot value. For example, if a parking lot has 2 spots, and the initial tolerance is 2 and the queue size per spot is 1.5, the parking lot will be disabled after 5 cars or bikes have pathfinded to it while it's available. (initial tolerance + queue size per spot * number of spots = 2 + 1.5 * 2 = 5)
Set a preset for the induced demand system. The presets adjust the initial tolerance and queue size per spot values. Use Custom to set your own values.
The number of cars or bikes that can pathfind to each available parking spot before it gets disabled. See description for the setting above for more details.
Number of nodes away for cars or bikes to reroute based on parking availability. For reference, the vanilla value is 4000.
